---
title: "Draft Quarto document"
author: "Rostools"
format: html
---

## Header 1

```{r setup}
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(fs)
source(here("R/functions.R"))
```

## Using regex for user

```{r}
user_info_df <- import_multiple_files(
  "user_info.csv",
  import_user_info
)

# This tests that it works:
extract_user_id(user_info_df)
```
